subject: India chemical tariff removal discussed
claim_text: Trade negotiators are discussing removal of existing tariffs on Indian chemical imports.

subject: Cambodia apparel tariff increase to 35%
claim_text: New 35% tariff on Cambodian apparel announced, escalating from existing 12%.

subject: Mexico steel and aluminum tariff pause extended
claim_text: The USTR extended the tariff pause on Mexican steel and aluminum imports for 60 days.

subject: 25% tariff on Mexican auto parts under IEEPA
claim_text: White House confirmed 25% tariff on auto parts and vehicle components from Mexico under IEEPA authority.

subject: 45% tariff on Indian plastic and rubber imports
claim_text: Executive order signed placing 45% tariff on plastic and rubber chemical imports from India.

subject: China tariff pause on garments suspended
claim_text: The 90-day pause on Chinese garment tariffs has been suspended pending review.

subject: USMCA auto parts tariff exemption rule proposed
claim_text: Commerce proposed removing USMCA tariff exemptions on certain auto parts from Mexico.
